note: Coverage is fluid and extended into new jurisdictions over time. Documents are split into Base (provided as standard) and Additional (available on request, not commonly needed, billed as an extra charge) so onboarding stays cost-effective.

jurisdictions.name: Australia
documentsNonMandatory: Application For Registration as a Proprietary Company (201C)
Change To Company Details Changes To (Members) Share Holdings (484N)
Change To Company Details Appointment Or Cessation Of A Company Officeholder (484E)
Application For Extension Of A Name Reservation (410F)

jurisdictions.name: Austria
documentsNonMandatory: Protokoll d. Generalversammlung (log d. general assembly)
Nachtrag zum Gesellschaftsvertrag (Addendum to the Articles of Association)

jurisdictions.name: Brazil
documentsNonMandatory: Ficha Cadastral Simplificada (dados atuais da empresa) (Simplified Registration Form (current company data))
Cópia Digitalizada de Documentos Arquivados (cópia simples - não tem valor jurídico de certidão) (Scanned Copy of Archived Documents (simple copy - has no legal certificate value))
Certidão Específica com Teor Solicitado (Specific Certificate with Requested Content)
Certidão Específica com Teor Solicitado - Registro de Livros (Specific Certificate with Requested Content - Book Registration)
Certidão de Inteiro Teor (Full Content Certificate)
Solicitação de Correção de Dados Cadastrais (Registration Data Correction Request)

jurisdictions.name: British Virgin Island (BVI)
documentsNonMandatory: Certified/Uncertified copy of a certificate of:
Certified/uncertified copy of a memorandum and/or Articles

jurisdictions.name: Brunei
documentsNonMandatory: Request of Information – Business Names Profile
Lodge General Form of Application to the Register

jurisdictions.name: Christmas Island
documentsNonMandatory: Application For Registration as a Proprietary Company (201C)
Change To Company Details Changes To (Members) Share Holdings (484N)
Change To Company Details Appointment Or Cessation Of A Company Officeholder (484E)
Application For Extension Of A Name Reservation (410F)

jurisdictions.name: Cocos (Keeling) Islands
documentsNonMandatory: Application For Registration as a Proprietary Company (201C)
Change To Company Details Changes To (Members) Share Holdings (484N)
Change To Company Details Appointment Or Cessation Of A Company Officeholder (484E)
Application For Extension Of A Name Reservation (410F)

jurisdictions.name: Croatia
documentsNonMandatory: Obavijest o elektroničkom upisu (Electronic enrollment notice)
Prilog uz rješenje o upisu (Attachment to the decision on enrollment)

jurisdictions.name: Cyprus
documentsMandatory: Memorandum and Articles in Foreign Language
documentsNonMandatory: Particulars in relation to the first directors and secretary
Communication of the address of the Registered Office or change to it
Compliance Declaration According to the Law
Notification of change of Officers and of their particulars
Communication of the address of the Registered Office or change to it
Transfer of shares of private companies

jurisdictions.name: Czech Republic
documentsNonMandatory: ostatní Zápis z jednání řádné valné hromady (others Minutes of the Ordinary General Meeting)
ostatní zahajovací rozvaha (other opening balance sheet)
změna právní formy, fúze Projekt rozdělení společnosti (change of legal form, merger Company division project)
zakladatelské dokumenty, notářský zápis (founding documents , notarial record)
smlouvy o převodu obchod. podílu (business transfer agreement. share)
ostatní - překlad výpisu z OR (others - translation of an extract from the Commercial Register)
zpráva auditora + účetní závěrka (auditor 's report + financial statements)
rozhod. o statut. orgánu - Rozhodnutí jed.spol. (decision. the statute. of the body - Decision of the single company)
zakladatelské dokumenty - ZL - úplné znění (founding documents - ZL - full text)

jurisdictions.name: Denmark
documentsNonMandatory: Redegørelse om efterfølgende erhvervelser (statement of subsequent acquisitions)

jurisdictions.name: Ecuador
documentsNonMandatory: Certificate of Compliance with Obligations and Legal Existence

jurisdictions.name: Gibraltar
documentsNonMandatory: Complete Archives Bundle (All Documents Showing As Available For This Company)
Notice Of Situation Of Registered Office
Substituted Particulars Of Directors, And Of Any Change Therein
Particulars Of Directors, And Of Any Change Therein
Special Resolution Amending Memorandum Of Association
Dup. Certificate Of Change Of Name
Particulars Of Directors, Managers And Secretaries, And Of Any Change Therein
Form Of Particulars For Registration Of Charge
Letter Of Consent To Act As Secretary
Return Of Members, And Of Any Change Therein

jurisdictions.name: Greece
documentsNonMandatory: Αίτηση καταχώρισης αποδεικτικού φορολογικής δήλωσης (Application for registration of a tax return receipt)
ΜΕΤΑΒΙΒΑΣΗ ΜΕΤΟΧΩΝ-ΕΠΕΚΤΑΣΗ ΣΚΟΠΟΥ-ΜΕΤΑΦΟΡΑ ΕΔΡΑΣ (Transfer Of Shares-expansion Of Purpose-transfer Of Headquarters)

ΑΠΟΧΩΡΗΣΗ ΕΤΑΙΡΟΥ, ΕΠΕΚΤΑΣΗ ΣΚΟΠΟΥ, ΑΛΛΑΓΗ ΔΙΑΧΕΙΡΗΣΗΣ (ΤΡΟΠΟΠΟΙΗΣΗ ΤΩΝ ΑΡΘΡΩΝ 3,5,6,8,9,11)ΚΑΙ ΚΩΔΙΚΟΠΟΙΗΣΗ ΚΑΤΑΣΤΑΤΙΚΟΥ (Departure Of Partner, Extension Of Purpose, Change Of Management (Amendment Of Articles 3,5,6,8,9,11) And Code Of Statutes.)

documentsNonMandatory: Redegørelse om efterfølgende erhvervelser (statement of subsequent acquisitions)

documentsMandatory: Certificate of Incorporation / Certificate of Incorporation issued in the place of incorporation
documentsNonMandatory: FND2A - Notice of Change of Company Secretary and Director (Appointment/Cessation)
FND2B - Notice of Change in Particulars of Company Secretary and Director
FND4 - Notice of Resignation of Company Secretary and Director
FND5 Notice of Change of Reserve Director (Nomination/Cessation)
FND7 Notice of Change in Particulars of Reserve Director
FND8 Notice of Resignation of Reserve Director
FNR1 - Notice of Change of Address of Registered Office
FNR2 - Notice of Location of Registers and Company Records
FNAA1 - Notice of Alteration of Company's Articles
FNNC1G - Incorporation Form (Company Not Limited by Shares)
FNN3 - Annual Return of Registered Non-Hong Kong Company
FNN1 - Application for Registration as Registered Non-Hong Kong Company
Certificate of Registration of Change of Corporate Name of Non-Hong Kong Company
FNM1 - Statement of Particulars of Charge
FNM2 - Notification of Payment / Satisfaction of Debt, Release from Charge, etc.
FM2 - Memorandum of Satisfaction or Release of Property from Charge

jurisdictions.name: HK IRD
documentsMandatory: Electronic Extract of Information on the Business Register
Duplicate of a valid business/branch registration certificate
documentsNonMandatory: Certified extract of information on the Business Register
Certified copy of a valid business/branch registration certificate

jurisdictions.name: India
documentsNonMandatory: Certificate Of Registration Of Order For The Reduction Of The Share Capital (In Case Of Govt. Companies
Certificate Of Registration Of The Special Resolution Confirming Alteration Of Object Clause(S)
Fresh Certificate Of Incorporation Consequent Upon Change Of Name
Certificate Of Registration Of Order For The Reduction Of The Share Capital
Copy of court order or NCLT or CLB or order by any other competent authority
Copy of resolution passed by the company
Copy of the intimation sent by company
Copy of written consent given by auditor
List of share holders, debenture holders

jurisdictions.name: Ireland
documentsMandatory: A1 Application to Register as a New Company
documentsNonMandatory: Duplicate Cert - Certificate of Incorporation of Company
Short Certificate for Business Names (Public Service use only)
Form B10 - Change Director or Secretary Details
C6 Memo Of Satisfaction Of A Charge-full
C17 Changes To Particulars Of Charge Holder
B5N- Allotment Of Shares- No Fee
B9 Notice of increase in members (CLG - Companies Limited by Guarantee and PULC - Public Unlimited Company with no share capital only)
H5 Return By A Company Purchasing Its Own Shares
C1 Mort/ Charge Created By Irish Company
B2 Change In Situation Of Reg Office
B21 Statutory Declaration Pursuant To S. 60
Notice of increase in nominal capital
M1 Notice Of Chg. To Single Members Company Reg 5
B47 Notice(Letter) Of Resignation Of Auditor

jurisdictions.name: Isle of Man
documentsMandatory: Memorandum of Association (only downloaded if no Annual Return filed yet)

jurisdictions.name: Jamaica
documentsNonMandatory: Additional documents may be requested, subject to availability

jurisdictions.name: Jersey
documentsMandatory: Certificate of Continuance (when Certificate of Incorporation is not available)
Certificate of Partnership (for Limited Partnership entities only)

jurisdictions.name: Liechtenstein

Registerauszug elektr. Amtssignatur alle Informationen (Register excerpt electronic Official signature all information)
Registerauszug manuell beglaubigt aktuelle informationen (Register extract manually notarized current information)
Registerauszug manuell beglaubigt alle informationen (Register extract manually notarizes all information)

Тековна состојба на трансакциски сметки на субјект (Current balance of transaction accounts of an entity)

jurisdictions.name: Malaysia
documentsNonMandatory: Notification of change in the Register of Members
Register Of Directors, Managers And Secretaries / S. 58 - Notification of change in the Register of Directors, Managers and Secretaries
Notification of change in the Business Address and / or Nature of Business
Registered Office And Office Hours / S. 46 - Notification for change in the registered address
Copy of Minute By Representative of Holding Company

jurisdictions.name: Malta
documentsNonMandatory: Alterations to the Memorandum and Articles
Notification of changes amongst directors or company secretary or in the representation of a company
Alteration of the Accounting Reference Period
Notice of claim for extension of period allowed for laying accounts
Notice that a company has ceased to be a single member company
Notification of compliance with Companies Act before the end of the transitional period
Report in terms of Sec. 73(6) - Non-Cash Consideration

jurisdictions.name: Myanmar
documentsNonMandatory: Certified Copy of the Company Certificate

documentsNonMandatory: Documenten zoals statuten, fusie- ofsplitsingsvoorstellen (Documents such as articles of association, merger or division proposals)
